product_overview: Public-facing WordPress homepage for Turbo Elite Motors, implemented as an Astra child theme with custom CSS/JS to support features like dark mode and header navigation. Includes a test homepage entry point for QA and troubleshooting.
core_goals: Deliver a responsive, SEO-friendly homepage that presents inventory and brand information clearly.
Provide accessible UI controls such as dark mode and clear header navigation.
Ensure a simple QA/test entry point (/test_homepage.php) for troubleshooting and verification.
Keep load behavior predictable and provide graceful fallback when assets or scripts fail.

features.name: Homepage Viewing
features.description: Allow visitors to load and browse the public homepage (root route) with support for header navigation, dark mode, and scrolling content. Provide a test page for QA and fallback when the main page experiences issues.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Page loads -> See homepage header and hero section -> Scroll through the homepage -> Click a header navigation link -> See corresponding section or navigation response
Navigate to / -> Page loads -> Scroll through the homepage -> Toggle Dark Mode control -> See dark mode styles applied to page elements
Navigate to / -> Page loads -> Toggle Dark Mode control -> Toggle Dark Mode control again -> See original (light) styles restored

Navigate to / -> Page fails to load (network or server error) -> See browser error message or blank content -> Click browser Reload -> Navigate to /test_homepage.php -> Test homepage loads as fallback for QA

Navigate to / -> Page loads partially (missing CSS/JS) -> See unstyled or non-interactive elements -> Click header navigation link -> See navigation not respond -> Open browser console or QA tools -> Report missing assets for debugging

features.name: Homepage Viewing
features.description: The user visits the homepage to view the website, interactions like dark mode and header navigation.
